hooks.command:
echo '⚠️  Humbleflow post-merge checklist:
1. Update SPEC.md Capabilities: append - [x] <feature> — <outcome>
2. Update BACKLOG.md: move completed item from Now to Done
3. Report next backlog item to the human: "Done. Next in backlog: [item]. Want to start it?"
4. Run: make quality
5. Run: make garden
6. Move plan to plans/completed/ if convention exists
7. Clean up ephemeral worktrees'
echo 'Review subagent completed. Synthesize findings into must-fix / should-fix / nits.'
